observation: Creator capsule routes now cover 11 retained surfaces with standardized vision QA, a unified regression orchestrator, a Darwin autonomy pre-flight check, multi-surface proof infrastructure, and a docs-surface parity check. The docs-surface parity check catches drift between WORKFLOW_INDEX, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, mutation-candidates.json, and filesystem before it accumulates across autonomous Darwin runs. Remaining gap: Playwright chromium binary health — the 2026-05-16 run discovered all 11 surfaces fail measure:check + print:render because a Playwright upgrade left the browser binary uninstalled; a pre-flight health check would catch this before silent failures propagate.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, and keep docs, examples, and checks in sync without manual inspection

candidates.mutation: Add a parity check (bun creator:docs-surface-parity) that validates WORKFLOW_INDEX.md surface entries, mutation-candidates.json retained_routes, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md retained mutations, and examples/*.html files are in sync — catching the recurring docs/surface drift failure mode.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-docs-surface-parity.ts that cross-references WORKFLOW_INDEX.md table entries, retained_routes in the candidate ledger, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md retained mutations, actual examples/*.html files for creator surfaces, and package.json script entries — reporting any missing/mismatched entries
candidates.risk: Must parse WORKFLOW_INDEX.md markdown table reliably; must handle new surface additions gracefully. Known mapping between doc (creator-vision-qa-standardization) and JSON (creator-touchdesigner-vision-qa-route).

candidates.mutation: Add a slice health check (bun creator:cron-slice-health) that validates the most recent autonomous Darwin cron slice completed cleanly — verifies PR state, branch SHA, CI status, and merge evidence for the last Darwin PR on the repo.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-cron-slice-health.ts that queries GitHub API for recent Darwin PRs, checks CI/merge state on the most recent, and reports slice completion evidence (branch, SHA, PR URL, merge status, CI verdict)
candidates.risk: Requires GitHub API access (gh or GITHUB_TOKEN). Must handle no-Darwin-PR-yet gracefully (first-run state). Must not leak private repo details in output.

candidates.mutation: Add a pre-flight health check (bun creator:playwright-health) that validates Playwright chromium is installed and launchable — preventing silent measure/print failures in cron Darwin runs when the browser binary version drifts after a Playwright upgrade.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-playwright-health.ts that checks the Playwright chromium binary exists at the expected cache path, reports INSTALLED/UPGRADE_NEEDED with the required version, and can be wired into darwin-autonomy-check as a WARN or FATAL gate
candidates.risk: Playwright cache paths differ by OS/arch (macOS arm64 vs Linux x86_64). Must detect without launching a browser (headless unavailable in CI). Must not install automatically (side-effect). Version extraction must handle Playwright's path format.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)
unified regression orchestrator (16-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
Darwin autonomy pre-flight check (repo anchor, git cleanliness, MCP connectivity, baseline gates)
unified artifact-measurement gateway (all 11 retained surface HTML artifacts validated against measure:check + print:render in one pass)

retention: Promote creator-docs-surface-parity-route as the selected winner: catches drift between WORKFLOW_INDEX.md, CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md, mutation-candidates.json, examples/*.html, and package.json in one pass. Retain creator-multi-surface-proof-route in retained_routes (was incorrectly only in CREATOR_EVOLUTION_ENGINE.md retained list — now unified). Add creator-playwright-health-route as new active candidate to prevent silent measure/print failures from uninstalled browser binaries.
